---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working the way it should
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, short description of what's wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See the error

## Expected behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual behavior

What actually happened instead?

## Screenshots (optional)

If applicable, add screenshots or a short screen recording to help
explain the problem.

## Device and browser

- Device: [e.g. iPhone 14, Samsung Galaxy S23, Desktop]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 18, Android 14, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 128, Safari 18]
- Screen width (if a layout issue): [e.g. 375px]

## Page where it happened

- [ ] Home (`/`)
- [ ] Map (`/map`)
- [ ] Colony page (`/colony/[id]`)
- [ ] Register a colony (`/colony/new`)
- [ ] Educational guide (`/learn` or `/learn/[slug]`)
- [ ] Emergency help (`/help`)
- [ ] Reports / Resources / Contacts / Stories (`/reports`)
- [ ] Impact (`/impact`)
- [ ] Glossary (`/glossary`)
- [ ] Plants (`/plants`)
- [ ] Profile (`/profile` or `/u/[id]`)
- [ ] Login / Signup
- [ ] Other (please specify): 

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — did this start happening recently,
does it only happen when signed in, does it happen in a specific
language (PT/EN), etc.
